tasks.title: XP/Level system with milestone rewards

spec.summary: Add XP column to players table. Award XP for actions (hire=50, sell=amount/10, create_biz=100, upgrade=200). Level thresholds: 0/100/300/600/1000/1500/2500/4000/6000/10000. Existing 10 milestones give cash bonus on completion. Show level + XP bar on dashboard.
spec.db_changes: ALTER TABLE players ADD COLUMN xp INTEGER DEFAULT 0; ALTER TABLE players ADD COLUMN level INTEGER DEFAULT 1;
spec.server_changes: Add XP award logic after each action in game routes. Add level calculation helper. Include xp/level in dashboard response and /auth/me.
spec.client_changes: Add XP bar + level badge to dashboard header. Toast on level up.
spec.validation: Extend validate.sh to check XP increments after actions

tasks.notes: XP/Level system: DB migration, XP awards on all actions (create=100, hire=50, sell=revenue/1000*10, upgrade=200), level thresholds, level-up activity log, dashboard XP bar, /auth/me includes xp/level

tasks.title: Toast notifications for all player actions

spec.summary: Wire useToast() into all mutation callbacks in DashboardScreen. Show success toast with details on hire/sell/create/upgrade/sell-all. Show error toast on failures. Add level-up celebration toast.
spec.pattern: In each useMutation onSuccess callback, call show() with contextual message

tasks.notes: Toasts wired into all mutations: hire, sell, sell-all, create-biz. Shows XP earned, level-up celebration. Error toasts on failures.

tasks.title: Leaderboard endpoint and UI

spec.summary: GET /game/leaderboard returns top 20 players by net_worth. Add LeaderboardScreen to client with rank/name/net_worth/level. Add tab in navigation.
spec.server_changes: New route: SELECT username, net_worth, level, xp FROM players ORDER BY net_worth DESC LIMIT 20
spec.client_changes: New screen + navigation tab. Pull-to-refresh. Highlight current player.

tasks.notes: GET /game/leaderboard (top 20 by net_worth + your rank). LeaderboardScreen with medals, level display, your-highlight. Tab navigation added.

tasks.title: Lock down CORS to specific origins

spec.summary: Replace origin:true with whitelist: localhost:8080, localhost:19006, VPS IP. Use env var ALLOWED_ORIGINS.
Generate new random JWT_SECRET and REFRESH_SECRET. Update .env. Invalidate all existing refresh tokens in DB. Document in .env.example.
Find all Math.random() calls in server code, replace with crypto.randomInt() or crypto.randomUUID(). Affects worker naming, skill generation.
Remove server/src/routes/_legacy/ directory entirely. Verify no imports reference it. Remove any dead shared types.
Add WebSocket endpoint that broadcasts after each game tick. Client subscribes and auto-refreshes dashboard on tick event instead of 30s polling. Use fastify-websocket.
spec.server_changes: Add WS route /ws/game. After gameTick completes, broadcast {type:'tick', data:{produced, duration}} to all connected clients.
spec.client_changes: Connect WS in DashboardScreen. On tick message, invalidate dashboard query.

spec.summary: Add maintenance costs per tick: each worker costs $50/tick, each business costs $100*tier/tick. Deduct in gameTick. If player cash < 0, workers quit (lowest skill first). Activity log entry for costs.
spec.server_changes: In gameTick.ts, after production phase, calculate and deduct costs. Handle negative cash by firing workers.
spec.client_changes: Show cost/tick in business card alongside production/tick.

spec.summary: Tap a business card to see detail screen. Shows worker list with skills, production history chart (last 20 ticks), upgrade path, and manage actions.
spec.server_changes: GET /game/businesses/:bizId already exists, extend with production history from activity_log.
spec.client_changes: New BusinessDetailScreen. Navigate from DashboardScreen business card tap.

spec.summary: Every 10th tick, roll for random event (10% chance per player). Events: Boom (+50% production 5 ticks), Bust (-30% production 5 ticks), Lucky Find (+$5000 cash), Equipment Break (-1 tier on random biz). Activity log + toast.
spec.db_changes: CREATE TABLE active_events (id UUID, player_id UUID, type VARCHAR, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ)
spec.server_changes: Event roll in gameTick. Apply modifiers during production calc. Clean expired events.

spec.summary: Add manifest.json with app name, icons, theme color. Generate icon set (192x192, 512x512). Add to Expo web config for installable PWA.
